free_text: Properties of levels induced by resonance neutrons
as a pulsed neutron source. The accelerator was working
then with a pulse width 50 ns, and a repetition
Photo-neutrons from a natural uranium target
Time of flight, flight path = 53.4 m.
Transmission measurement. For each isotope, two
measures corresponding to two different thicknesses
of the sample were systematically carried out.
Only S-wave resonances seen due to thin sample.
